description: A2A Plane final go/no-go gate schema. Aggregates the execution orchestrator dry-run plan into a presentable final approval packet. Produces deterministic GO/NO-GO per-repo matrix, release candidate tagging readiness, and CI gate capsule. Never executes approval, release, visibility changes, or live sends.

gates.title: Execution orchestrator plan binding
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Final approval packet is not bound to the execution orchestrator's deterministic dry-run plan; gate cannot proceed.
evidence: Orchestrator plan id matches the execution orchestrator report's deterministicPlanId.
Orchestrator decision is NEEDS_OPERATOR_APPROVAL or GO_CANDIDATE (not NO_GO).
Orchestrator execution mode is dry-run/simulate; no live execution was performed.
Plan binding is pinned by the orchestrator report's idempotency key hash.

gates.title: Aggregated per-repo GO/NO-GO matrix
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Per-repo GO/NO-GO matrix is missing, incomplete, or contains unresolved gates.
evidence: Matrix covers all lanes in the round: plane, plugin, runner, and broker repos.
Each lane has a named owner, status, evidence link, and timestamp.
Aggregate decision is GO only when every required gate across all lanes is GO or explicitly waived.
Cross-broker handoff evidence links at least two broker lanes.

gates.title: Release candidate tagging readiness
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Release candidate tag is not ready or references unapproved artifacts.
evidence: Release candidate tag references a specific commit SHA with a deterministic naming scheme.
Tag does not imply release publication, npm publish, Docker publish, or visibility change.
Tag manifest includes the orchestrator plan id and approval packet id.
Tag creation script is idempotent and no-live.

gates.title: CI gate capsule
gates.blockedWhenMissing: CI gate is not documented or its checks cannot be independently verified.
evidence: CI gate checks are listed with individual pass/fail status for each repo lane.
CI gate includes: build, test, lint, scanner, and conformance checks.
CI gate does not mutate production state, deploy, restart, or send provider messages.
Gate capsule includes the CI run ID and redacted log links.

gates.title: Final operator approval packet
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Final approval packet is missing, structurally incomplete, or not bound to the orchestrator plan.
evidence: Packet has stable packetId and manifestDigest derived from orchestrator plan, gate matrix, RC tag, and CI capsule.
Packet is deterministic: identical input produces identical packet.
Packet summary is presentable for operator review with blocked/ready gate counts.
Operator approval gate is explicitly separate from the approval packet's evidence ledger.

gates.title: Scanner/history evidence binding
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Scanner/history evidence is not bound to the final approval packet.
evidence: Scanner digest, history digest, and manifest digest are redacted and bound to this packet.
Findings are clean or explicitly dispositioned without publishing secret values.
Binding manifest digest matches the orchestrator plan's scanner binding digest.

gates.title: Idempotency and replay protection
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Idempotency key or replay guard is missing; duplicate final approval packets could exist.
evidence: Unique idempotency key is derived from run identifier, orchestrator plan id, and lane.
Replay detection confirms no prior final approval packet with the same key exists.
Duplicate submission produces the same result or clean rejection.

gates.title: Rollback and abort runbook
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Rollback/abort runbook is missing, incomplete, or would cause live side effects.
evidence: Rollback procedure stops all gate aggregation and reverts to orchestrator-only state.
Abort procedure handles each gate failure individually without cascading.
Both rollback and abort are no-live: no deploys, restarts, provider sends, DB mutations, or visibility changes.

gates.title: OpenClaw runtime/bootstrap hygiene
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Runtime/bootstrap context files would enter branch diff, PR text, issue comment, or artifact evidence.
evidence: Branch diff and artifact evidence exclude all denyPaths.
Block output reports exact repo-relative offending paths when detected.

gates.title: Redacted evidence policy
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Evidence includes raw secrets, raw session dumps, provider targets, host-private paths, or unredacted identifiers.
evidence: Evidence contains issue/PR URLs, statuses, counts, hashes, and redacted artifact references only.
No credentials, provider identifiers, chat IDs, raw logs, raw session dumps, or host-private paths are pasted.

gates.title: Public/private boundary
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Repository remains private; visibility change is not part of this gate.
evidence: GitHub metadata shows repository is still private.
Docs and examples contain no private endpoints, provider identifiers, raw session dumps, or runtime/bootstrap files.

gates.title: Cross-lane evidence binding
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Cross-lane evidence is missing or incomplete; final approval packet cannot validate all repos.
evidence: Each sibling lane (plugin, runner, broker) has an evidence status linked in the matrix.
Cross-broker handoff evidence links the plane lane to at least one broker lane.
All lane evidence postdates the last commit in the respective repo.

a2a-plane.role: Final go/no-go gate schema and operator approval packet aggregator

openclaw-plugin-a2a.role: Plugin final go/no-go operator-facing status projection

a2a-docker-runner.role: Runner final release candidate tagging and CI gate capsule

a2a-broker.role: Broker final go/no-go gate ledger and approval intent record
